conclusion: Quality-equivalence was judged against hard gates, required output coverage, explicit blockers/follow-ups/provenance/boundaries, machine readability, and material loss versus xhigh.
selected_reason: Lowest-cost quality-equivalent candidate; keeps per-action closure rows, ledger, matrix, unresolved items, rerun readiness, blockers, carry-forward, owner-decision queue, and handoffs explicit.
limitations: No isolated subagent/candidate-runner surface was available in this runtime.
CLI telemetry is proxy telemetry for these CLI candidates only.
No exact subagent token telemetry exists.
